project.name: GestionPracticasDesktop
project.description: Builds, tests, and runs the project GestionPracticasDesktop.

target.name: fat-jar
target.description: Genera un JAR ejecutable con todas las dependencias incluidas

target.name: release
target.description: Genera la carpeta release/ lista para distribuir
target.echo: #!/bin/bash java -jar GestionPracticasDesktop.jar if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "" echo "Error al iniciar. Verifique que Java 17 o superior este instalado." fi
